artifact: official paper repository and claimed interactive site for arXiv:2607.15263v1

official_repository.timing_boundary: The audited commit is 23.98 hours after arXiv v1 and is official but not treated as the exact paper-time state.
official_repository.release_boundary: The 38-entry archive is a manuscript/figure repository. It excludes the BOTS implementation, agent/scorer code, datasets, raw Inspect logs, per-task scores, bootstrap code, and source evaluation checkout. README.md points to a private local ~/projects/inspect-cyber-eval path; tables/provenance.md names absent source-eval-repo artifacts. Compact numeric additions and raster chart snapshots are present, but most trajectories are regenerated by pixel digitization rather than auditable raw rows.

claimed_interactive_site.status: The fetched canonical root was a generic Frontier Security landing page and exposed no paper results, benchmark data, run records, or interactive evaluation interface.

discovery.method: arXiv API latest-result search, followed by exact-title and author/repository web searches
discovery.official_repository_basis: Author-owned GitHub repository named in search results; repository README identifies the exact paper.
